property_specification: The system can be in AUTO_LOITER mode.
When in AUTO_RTL mode, the aircraft eventually returns to home and loiters.
The device health is set to Warning if gnss.solution_dimension is less than gnss.warn_dimens.
If the number of satellites is below the threshold gnss.warn_sats, then the device health will eventually be set to Warning.
It is possible that non-motor outputs are active when the system is in the prearm state and COM_PREARM_MODE is true.
It is possible that when the system is in the prearm state and COM_PREARM_MODE is true, PWM_AUX_DIS11 is not equal to 1000.
Possibly, when COM_PREARM_MODE is set and the system is in prearm state, PWM_AUX_DIS4 is greater than 0.
It is possible that in prearm state with COM_PREARM_MODE set, the output value is greater than 0.
Whenever ASPD_FALLBACK_GW is enabled, airspeed checks are enabled, and no other airspeed sensor is available, the system eventually uses sensor-less airspeed estimation.
When the airspeed innovation exceeds the threshold ASPD_FS_INNOV, a failsafe is eventually triggered.
If ASPD_SCALE_APPLY is 0, then the estimated scale is not automatically applied.
If ASPD_SCALE_APPLY is 1, then the estimated scale is applied after disarm.
If ASPD_SCALE_APPLY is 2, then in air leads to scale application.
The synthetic airspeed estimate is valid whenever the horizontal wind uncertainty is below the threshold ASPD_WERR_THR.
The attitude estimator is disabled when ATT_EN is 0.
If MC_AT_APPLY is 1, then after disarm, gains are applied.
When the battery level is below the emergency threshold, landing is eventually triggered.
If a landing situation is detected and the time-out period is positive, then the vehicle will be automatically disarmed after the time-out period elapses.
Whenever the system is without datalink for COM_DL_LOSS_T seconds, the GCS connection lost mode will eventually be triggered.
When the system is in Hold mode and the time since entering Hold is at least COM_FAIL_ACT_T seconds, it eventually enters the failsafe action.
If the time since takeoff is greater than COM_FLT_TIME_MAX and COM_FLT_TIME_MAX is not -1, then the mode will eventually be RTL or Land.
Starting from 90% of the maximum flight time, a warning message will be sent.
If the datalink is absent for at least 120 seconds, then the system eventually enters data link lost mode.
When the datalink has been healthy for at least COM_HLDL_REG_T seconds, the datalink loss flag is false.
When the battery is critical and COM_LOW_BAT_ACT is 2, the system eventually enters land mode.
When the battery is emergency and COM_LOW_BAT_ACT is 3, the system eventually enters land mode.
The offboard loss failsafe will only be entered after a timeout, set by COM_OF_LOSS_T in seconds.
When navigation loss occurs and COM_POSCTL_NAVL is 0 and height estimate is not available, the system eventually enters Manual mode.
When navigation loss occurs and COM_POSCTL_NAVL is 1 and height estimate is not available, the system eventually enters Descend mode.
If position checks are failed for COM_POS_FS_DELAY seconds, then the failsafe will eventually activate.

If the system is in auto mode, RC override for auto is enabled (COM_RC_OVERRIDE bit 0 set and not critical battery), and RC stick movement exceeds COM_RC_STICK_OV, then eventually the mode will be position or altitude.
uppaal_formula: (mode == auto && (COM_RC_OVERRIDE & 1) != 0 && !critical_battery && stick_movement > COM_RC_STICK_OV) --> (mode == position || mode == altitude)

property_specification: If the system is in offboard mode, RC override for offboard is enabled (COM_RC_OVERRIDE bit 1 set), and RC stick movement exceeds COM_RC_STICK_OV, then eventually the mode will be position or altitude.
uppaal_formula: (mode == offboard && (COM_RC_OVERRIDE & 2) != 0 && stick_movement > COM_RC_STICK_OV) --> (mode == position || mode == altitude)

property_specification: If TAKEOFF is completed and Mission is not valid, then the system will eventually transition to Hold mode.
The failsafe is triggered when the horizontal velocity error exceeds COM_VEL_FS_EVH.
If the previous velocity error was below COM_VEL_FS_EVH, the failsafe is triggered when the error exceeds 2.5 * COM_VEL_FS_EVH.
If the wind speed exceeds the COM_WIND_MAX threshold, then the failsafe action is eventually triggered.
When wind speed is above threshold and COM_WIND_MAX_ACT is not None, the system cannot be in auto modes other than RTL or Land.
uppaal_formula: A[] (wind_high && COM_WIND_MAX_ACT != 0 imply (mode == RTL || mode == LAND || mode != AUTO))

property_specification: If the GCS connection is lost for at least COM_DL_LOSS_T seconds and the failsafe is not disabled (NAV_DLL_ACT != 0), then the system will eventually enter the failsafe mode corresponding to NAV_DLL_ACT.
uppaal_formula: ( lost && t >= COM_DL_LOSS_T && NAV_DLL_ACT != 0 ) --> ( current_mode == NAV_DLL_ACT )

property_specification: The heading is assumed to be observable when the body acceleration is greater than EKF2_MAG_ACCLIM when a global position/velocity aiding source is active.
If EKF2_MULTI_MAG is greater than 0, then SENS_MAG_MODE must be 0.
Whenever the accumulated velocity error exceeds 2.0 m/s, the sensor is eventually declared faulty.

If the vehicle is armed, the failure detector is enabled, no acknowledgement is received from ESCs, and more than 0.3 seconds have passed (assuming a clock reset at the start of the check), then the vehicle will be disarmed.
When the pitch angle exceeds FD_FAIL_P, the attitude_failure flag is triggered.
When the imbalanced propeller metric is greater than or equal to FD_IMB_PROP_THR, a failure is triggered eventually.
Whenever the vertical distance exceeds GF_MAX_VER_DIST and GF_MAX_VER_DIST is greater than 0, a geofence action is eventually triggered.
When the motor signal is at 1, the elapsed time since it was at 0 is at least the slew rate value CA_R1_SLEW.
The maximum airspeed allowed in the landed state is 6.00 m/s.
Whenever the system is in the landed state, the vertical velocity is at most LNDFW_VEL_Z_MAX.
When the multicopter is in the landed state, its horizontal velocity is always at most 1.5 m/s.
After an abort landing occurs, the vehicle eventually reaches an altitude of at least the minimum abort altitude.
The system will always obey the minimum loiter altitude in Loiter (Hold) mode when switched into this mode without specifying an altitude.
In Acro mode, whenever the stick is fully deflected, the roll rate eventually reaches MC_ACRO_R_MAX.
Collision avoidance is disabled when CP_DIST is negative and enabled otherwise.
When MPC_ALT_MODE is 2 and speed is below MPC_HOLD_MAX_XY, the altitude reference is always terrain hold (mode 2).
MPC_LAND_ALT2 is always less than MPC_LAND_ALT1.
In Stabilized mode, if the collective thrust is below MPC_MANTHR_MIN, it eventually leads to loss of roll, pitch, and yaw torque control authority.
Whenever the horizontal position tracking error exceeds MPC_XY_ERR_MAX, the integration of the trajectory setpoint is halted.
If autolanding is allowed, the system eventually lands after the delay has passed.
If the groundspeed drops below MPC_XY_CRUISE, the transition is declared over.
If COM_DISARM_LAND is non-negative, the vehicle is disarmed within COM_DISARM_LAND seconds after landing.
uppaal_formula: A[] (landed and x >= COM_DISARM_LAND imply disarmed)

property_specification: If the vehicle has low thrust and no rotation for 8.0 seconds, it will eventually transition to the next state.
The vehicle cannot be armed unless the safety switch is engaged.
When throttle is at minimum and yaw is at maximum for at least 1 second, the vehicle will eventually be armed.
If the system is disarmed and the arming button is pressed for at least one second, then the system will eventually become armed.
Arming is prevented when the safety switch is not engaged.
If the vehicle is flying and does not have a valid local position, it will eventually enter failsafe mode.
If RC stick is moved and not in critical battery failsafe, then the mode will eventually be Position mode.
When COM_RC_OVERRIDE is enabled and stick movement exceeds COM_RC_STICK_OV, the system eventually transitions to Position mode.
In Altitude mode, if the control sticks are released, the vehicle will eventually maintain altitude.
In Manual/Stabilized mode, if the control sticks are released, the vehicle will eventually maintain horizontal posture.
The vehicle in Takeoff mode eventually enters Hold mode.
If no mission is stored, or mission execution is finished, or mission is not feasible, and the vehicle is flying, it will eventually hold.
uppaal_formula: (no_mission or mission_finished or mission_not_feasible) and flying --> hold

property_specification: If a mission is stored and PX4 is flying, it will eventually execute the mission.
If there is no mission stored or the mission is finished, and PX4 is flying, it will eventually hold.
Mission start is prevented if the distance to waypoint exceeds MIS_DIST_1WP and MIS_DIST_1WP is greater than 0.
If the vehicle is in landed state and the throttle stick percentage is greater than 62.5, then the vehicle will eventually be in flying state.
Manual input for yaw leads to autopilot assistance for stabilizing attitude rate.
Always, when the throttle stick is centered and MPC_THR_CURVE is set to default, the hover throttle is output.
Always, if the altitude is less than or equal to MPC_LAND_ALT2, then the velocity is at most MPC_LAND_SPEED.
When the system is in Position slow mode and external limits are not provided, the horizontal velocity limit is 3 m/s.
uppaal_formula: A[] ( (mode == POSITION_SLOW and not external_input) imply h_limit == 3 )

property_specification: If RTL_LAND_DELAY is set to -1, the system will loiter at RTL_DESCEND_ALT.
The system will eventually land if RTL_LAND_DELAY is not -1 and it is at RTL_DESCEND_ALT.
If the vehicle is horizontally closer than RTL_MIN_DIST to home, it will return at its current altitude or RTL_DESCEND_ALT (whichever is higher).
If the vehicle is a flying vehicle and does not have a global position estimate, then it cannot switch to Hold mode.
If the hover mode is engaged and the altitude is below NAV_MIN_LTR_ALT, then the vehicle will eventually reach an altitude of at least NAV_MIN_LTR_ALT.
When the vehicle is at search altitude and the search timeout has elapsed with no target visible, a normal landing is eventually initiated.

If the target is not visible for more than PLD_BTOUT seconds while in the horizontal approach phase, then eventually the vehicle will enter either the search procedure state or the normal landing state.
uppaal_formula: (state == horizontal_approach && !target_visible && c > PLD_BTOUT) --> (state == search_procedure || state == normal_landing)

property_specification: The vehicle starts descending when the horizontal distance is within the acceptance radius.
It is possible for the vehicle to activate motors after detecting it has reached the apex of a throw.
When the heading parameter is not set (param4 is NaN) and the vehicle type is multi-rotor, the vehicle eventually has its yaw heading equal to the target specified by MPC_YAW_MODE.
Setting the parameter RTL_TYPE to 3 leads to safety points being enabled.
